# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: projects
    type: google::projects
    properties:
      projectId: my-project-id

  - name: vpcNetworks
    type: google::vpc_network
    properties:
      project: ${projects.selfLink}
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      name: my-vpc-network
      routingMode: REGIONAL

  - name: vpcSubnets
    type: google::compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      project: ${projects.selfLink}
      region: us-central1
      network: ${vpcNetworks.selfLink}
      ipCidrRange: '10.0.0.0/24'
      name: my-subnet-tier-1

  - name: vpcSubnets2
    type: google::compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      project: ${projects.selfLink}
      region: us-central1
      network: ${vpcNetworks.selfLink}
      ipCidrRange: '10.0.1.0/24'
      name: my-subnet-tier-2

  - name: vpcSubnets3
    type: google::compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      project: ${projects.selfLink}
      region: us-central1
      network: ${vpcNetworks.selfLink}
      ipCidrRange: '10.0.2.0/24'
      name: my-subnet-tier-3
